prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 103.8 kg; Height 174.7 cm; BMI 34.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.0%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 174mg/dL; 9 months ago 172mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 197mg/dL; current 209mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 104.7kg; 9 months ago 100.2kg; 6 months ago 104.7kg; 3 months ago 102.2kg; current 103.8kg), Height (12 months ago 174.7cm; 9 months ago 174.7cm; 6 months ago 174.7cm; 3 months ago 174.7cm; current 174.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 34.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 27U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 8.0U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 60mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 56mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 81mg/g; 9 months ago 90mg/g; 6 months ago 73mg/g; 3 months ago 106mg/g; current 87mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 69mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 169mg/dL; 9 months ago 167mg/dL; 6 months ago 151mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 158mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
